metadata.description: PEV agent system — Plan-Execute-Validate workflow for structured code changes. Also ships hook-spike, a minimal plugin-hook test harness.

plugins.name: pev
plugins.description: PEV (Plan-Execute-Validate) agent workflow with cortex integration

plugins.name: hook-spike
plugins.description: Graduated plugin-hook test agents — isolates hook resolution behavior (CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT vs CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR, frontmatter vs hooks.json) with canary-file reporting and hook-input-JSON dumping
